)	ar
This test case provides support for checking forking and wait behavior.
To test different wait behavior, override the wait_impl method.
We want fork1() semantics -- only the forking thread survives in the
child after a fork().
On some systems (e.g. Solaris without posix threads) we find that all
active threads survive in the child after a fork(); this is an error.
support
ForkWaitc
threading_setup
_threading_key
alive
stop
threads)
self
&/usr/lib64/python3.9/test/fork_wait.py
setUp
ForkWait.setUpc
join
clearr
threading_cleanupr
threadr
tearDown
ForkWait.tearDownc
getpidr
time
sleep
SHORTSLEEP
OSError)
ForkWait.fc
exitcode)
wait_process)

	wait_impl.
ForkWait.wait_implc
rBqjqBt
target

Z	unixware7r

	monotonicr

	LONGSLEEP
_exitr
